titles.text: Simple 1500 Series Vol. 38: The Real Racing Toyota
Simple 1500シリーズ Vol. 38: The レアルレーシング Toyota

descriptions.text: Simple 1500 Series vol. 38: The Real Racing - Toyota is a racing game that features different Toyotas car models that can be drive in different Japanese circuits and in different time (noon, evening, night, etc) and weather conditions (sunny, cloudy, rain or misty).
